subject: Zubat, an eyeless bat-like creature in mid-flight through a sunlit forest
description: A blue, bat-like creature hovers mid-flight in a sunlit forest clearing. Its wide wing membranes are extended, showing deep blue and blue-violet tones with lighter undersides. The creature has no visible eyes — just a smooth rounded head with small nostrils and an open mouth — consistent with its eyeless design. The background is a warm, dappled forest scene with tall trees and golden light filtering through foliage, giving the image an airy, sun-drenched feel despite the creature's nocturnal nature.
foreground: eyeless bat creature in flight, blue and blue-violet wing membranes
background: sunlit forest with tall trees and golden dappled light
